messages.content: Hi Amanda, it's Greg Tanaka. My neighbor Beth gave me your number. Kitchen faucet has been dripping for weeks, any chance you could take a look?
hey greg yeah i can come by saturday morning. whats your address
3821 Beacon Ave S. Saturday works great. 9am?
perfect see u then
all set. new cartridge and no more drip
Looks great, thank you so much!
Amanda, my water heater is making a popping sound. Is that something you can help with?
yeah sounds like sediment. i can flush it and check the anode rod saturday
Saturday the 10th? Perfect.
Much quieter already. You're a lifesaver.
glad to help
hey greg u still want that garbage disposal put in
Yes! When can you come?
saturday the 21st work? morning
9am like last time?
ill be there at 830 actually, disposal installs take a bit longer
heading over now
Door's unlocked. Coffee's on.
done. ran it a few times sounds good. remember no fibrous stuff like celery
Got it. Thanks Amanda!
Hey Amanda, want to put a utility sink in my garage. Is that doable?
not too bad if theres a drain line out there. do u have one
I think so? There's a capped pipe in the corner.
perfect ill come look saturday
sink is in and draining good. had to extend the supply lines about 4 ft
This is incredible. Thank you!
Amanda, I need a new main shutoff valve. It barely turns and it drips. Can you do that?
yep thats actually important to fix. saturday the 25th?
Sounds good. Same time?
yeah 10ish. gotta shut off the main at the street
all done. new quarter turn ball valve, way easier to operate
Smooth as butter. Thanks as always.
Hi is this Amanda? Mei-Lin Chen gave me your number. My kitchen sink barely drains and the disposal makes a horrible noise
hi karen yeah i can take a look. saturday work?
This Saturday? That would be amazing.
ok 930. whats the address
8130 Seward Park Ave S. Thank you!
on my way
Great I'll leave the side gate open
all fixed. drain was clogged about 3 ft down and replaced the disposal bearings
You're amazing! It sounds completely different now.
Hey Amanda just wanted to say thanks again for fixing the sink yesterday. My husband couldn't believe how fast you got it working. We'll definitely call you again!
glad it worked out! pass my number along if anyone needs help
taking biscuit to the vet at 10 dont let me forget
Already on the calendar. You're welcome 😊
lol ok thanks
biscuit is good. vet says hes totally healthy
That's great! Did they mention his weight? He's been looking a little chunky.
lol yeah they said cut back on treats. tell sloane
Ha. I'll talk to her. How much was the visit?
like 180 for the checkup and shots
Not terrible. Paying out of checking?
yeah already took care of it
Ok thanks babe ❤️

Amanda I need you to hear me out. I have been patient about the move and I have tried to have this conversation a dozen times. Every time you say you will think about it and nothing happens. I need you to start seriously looking at jobs outside Seattle. Not talking about it. Actually applying. Because if this does not start moving forward then we need to have a different kind of conversation about what we both want here.
ok wow
D its not that simple. i cant just leave
I'm not asking you to leave tomorrow. I'm asking you to start. Send one application. Have one phone call. Just show me you're trying.
what about sloane. she doesnt want to move
She's 9 Amanda. She'll adjust. We're the adults and we need to do what's best for this family long term. A yard. A real school district. We can't afford any of that here.
and frank? his flexibility with my schedule is not something ill find anywhere else
There are other bosses in other cities. You are a good plumber and someone will hire you.
fine ill look
Not just look. Actually apply somewhere. By next weekend.
ok
Thank you. I love you. This is for us. ❤️
love u too
going to take biscuit out
Hey babe, I added a budget review to the calendar for tonight. I updated the spreadsheet with all of January's numbers so we can go through it after Sloane goes to bed.
ok sounds good
Just shared the spreadsheet with you. I highlighted the things I want to go over 📊
k ill look at it
Good morning. Did you get a chance to look at the spreadsheet? I want to get this squared away before the weekend is over.

Ok so I went through the checking statement line by line this morning. We're about $383 short of where the budget says we should be at the end of January. Can you think of any charges I might be missing?
idk maybe groceries were higher
I already have groceries at $537 and that matches the receipts. It's something else.
ill look at it tonight ok
Ok.
Can you look at the spreadsheet tonight? Something doesn't add up.
yeah hold on
There's a $135 recurring debit on the 17th that I can't find anywhere in our budget, and a $250 Zelle transfer on the 5th. Those two alone are almost the whole gap. What are they?
the 135 is some old autopay thing i set up awhile ago forgot about it. the 250 was parts for a friend i helped with a project
What autopay? I need to know what it's for so I can put it in the spreadsheet. And what friend needed $250 in parts?
babe im watching the game can we do this tmrw
Fine.
love u
looks right to me babe
You barely looked at it.
i looked this morning while you were sleeping. everything adds up
The $383 gap just disappeared?
some of those were pending charges that got reversed. chase does that sometimes
I don't know, Amanda. I feel like there's something you're not telling me.
theres nothing. its fine. the numbers are fine
How's the job search going? Have you looked at anything?
yeah i sent an app to a place in olympia
Wait really?? Where? What's the company?
olympic mechanical. journeyman plumber posting
That's great! When did you apply?
last week. havent heard back yet
Ok keep me posted. I'm really proud of you for doing this ❤️
yeah well see
Hey, so I want to sit down and do taxes next Saturday. I already have my 1099s pulled together. Can you find your W-2? They should have sent it by now.
yeah i got an email from adp a while ago. ill download it
Perfect. Also do we have any other income we need to report? Interest from savings, side work, anything like that?
nah just my w2. and whatever interest chase gives us which is like 3 dollars lol
Ok just making sure. Last thing we need is the IRS coming after us.
for real
I was thinking we use TurboTax again. Married filing jointly. Should take a couple hours tops.
sounds good. morning or afternoon
Let's do 10am. Sloane can play or watch TV and we'll be done by lunch.
k
I'll put it on the calendar ❤️
Did you download your W-2? We're doing taxes tomorrow
yep got it on my phone
Good. I made a list of all our deductions too. Sloane's after school program, my home office expenses, the donations to Rainier FC.
damn you really went all out
I'm a bookkeeper babe. This is literally what I do 📊
that wasnt as bad as i thought
Told you! And $1,247 back. That's going right into checking.
we should put it in savings
That's what I was thinking. We need to rebuild that account.
yeah
I'll review everything tonight and file Monday or Tuesday.
Filed! Got the confirmation email. Federal return submitted 🙌
nice
Refund should hit in about 3-4 weeks. Direct deposit to checking.
sounds good
Just got another email. IRS already accepted our return.
that was fast
the kicks been squealing when i brake
Great. How much is that going to cost us?
im gonna do it myself
Are you sure? I don't want you making it worse.
babe i literally fix things for a living
Fair enough lol. How much for parts?
like 120 maybe 150 for pads and rotors. shop would charge 400+
Ok just order them. Do you need anything else for it?
nah got all the tools. easy job
Any updates on the job search? It has been a while since you mentioned that Olympia place.
yeah i applied to another one too. in tacoma
Tacoma?? That's so much closer than Olympia. What company?
cascade plumbing. did a phone screen last week
You had a phone screen and didn't tell me?? How did it go?
it was fine. just feeling things out
Ok well that is exciting. Tacoma would be amazing. We could actually afford a house there.
lets not get ahead of ourselves
I know I know. But this is progress. Thank you for taking this seriously. ❤️
just got off heading home
Ok good. Sloane and I are at the kitchen table doing homework.
Hey so when I grabbed your phone to check the weather I saw a Walgreens notification. Is that a new prescription or something?
oh yeah just my refill is ready
Your metformin? I thought you just picked that up.
yeah they send the notification early sometimes. its fine
Ok just checking. You would tell me if something was going on right?
babe its literally just a pharmacy notification lol. everything is fine
Ok ok. What do you want for dinner? I was thinking that chicken tortilla soup.
soup sounds good im starving
Starting it now. Also Sloane has a field trip permission slip due Monday. It is on the counter.
k ill sign it
Thank you. How was work today?
fine. long. frank had us on a commercial job in ballard all day
Well you are home now. Soup will be ready in about 30 minutes ❤️
heading out for errands prob be gone most of the morning
Ok. Can you grab eggs and that almond milk Sloane likes?
yep
just finishing up one more stop
You've been gone for 4 hours for errands?
yeah traffic was bad and home depot took forever
ok
What errands are you doing all day every Saturday now. Where are you actually going
what do u mean lol. groceries home depot oil change stuff
It just seems like a lot. Every single Saturday you're gone half the day.
idk what to tell you D stuff needs to get done
I'm not trying to start a thing. I just miss you on weekends.
i know. sorry. ill try to knock stuff out faster
ok ❤️
doing the brakes tmrw morning before it rains
Sounds good. I'll keep Sloane out of the parking lot.
lol she'll wanna watch
She'll want to "help" and lose all your bolts 😂
done. both sides
Already?? Nice work babe, saved us like $300
told u. test drove around the block too, smooth
My wife the mechanic ❤️
plumber mechanic dog mom
Refund just hit! $1,247 in checking 🎉
nice
Moving it to savings right now.
sounds good babe
Done. We're at $1,587 in savings now. Getting there.
MOM CAN WE DO A VOLCANO???
lol
a volcano??
YES FOR THE SCIENCE FAIR PLEEEEASE
olivia is doing a plant one and thats BORING
ok hold on let me read the rules first
Lol she grabbed my phone. She's been going on about this since she got home
haha classic
baking soda and vinegar volcano right
Yeah that's the one. She needs a display board too
I took a pic of the packet from her backpack
cool ill check it out tonight
taking sloane to michaels tmrw for the science fair stuff
Perfect. She needs the tri-fold board and the baking soda/vinegar
Maybe paint and clay for the volcano part?
ya thats the plan
Try to keep it under $30 if you can 😅
42 bucks at michaels
she picked out glitter paint
Of course she did 😂
sparkly volcano
Did you get the board and everything?
got it all. tri fold, paint, clay, baking soda, vinegar, food coloring
mochi still wont eat
Since Saturday?? She hasn't touched anything?
no and shes hiding under the bed all day
That is not normal. Call the vet first thing tomorrow.
yeah thats the plan
called rainier beach they can see her at 3:30
Ok good. I'll grab Sloane from school so you can go straight there.
thanks D
at the vet with mochi
shes being so pitiful
Poor baby. What are they saying?
they think she swallowed something. doing xrays
Oh no. Keep me updated please.
its a hair tie. they can see it on the xray
A hair tie?? Oh my god.
yeah they gotta do a small procedure to get it out
Is it dangerous??
vet says its pretty routine. should be quick
Ok. Keep me posted ❤️
mochi is fine they got it out, was only 180
$180 for an emergency visit? That's honestly not bad.
yeah coulda been way worse
Is she groggy? Do they have special instructions?
yeah soft food for a few days. shes pretty zonked
Poor girl. We need to cat-proof the bathroom. All the hair ties need to go in a drawer.
lol yeah thats on both of us
True. I'm just so glad she's ok ❤️
same. heading home now
Drive safe. Dinner is almost ready.
hey did you add the cleanup thing to the calendar
Just did! Sunday at 9. Sloane hasn't stopped talking about it.
lol she told me she wants to find a turtle
Of course she does 😂 I'll dig out the yard gloves tonight.
cool i think we have extra trash bags under the sink too
hey where are you guys
By the sign-in table. Sloane is getting her gloves from the volunteer lady.
k coming. just parked
ok so theres like 4 sections. stream bank, playground, the trail, and parking lot
Let's do the stream bank. Sloane will love being near the water.
thats what i was thinking
playground crew already has like 12 people
Stream it is then!
this is actually pretty bad down here. found 3 tires already
I know! Sloane filled a whole bag already. She's so into it.
shes a machine lol
going down past the bridge to help pull some stuff out of the water. be back in a bit
Ok! We'll keep working up here.
Ok so Sloane just found a frog and she is FREAKING OUT
haha where
Under that big log by the bridge. She's holding it and won't put it down.
oh no
She wants to keep it. Already named it Ribbit.
of course she did 😂
She says it can live in the bathtub
we literally just tiled that bathroom
I KNOW 😂😂
tell her we can look at it for a little while but it has to stay here
Already tried. She's negotiating terms.
coming back up. my section is done
She's still holding the frog
ok she finally let it go but shes not happy with me
She'll get over it. Already looking for another one 😂 This was really fun though, we should do this every year. ❤️
Who was that on the phone just now
what
I heard something about fixing a sink?
oh lol thats karen. friend of mei-lins. she had a clogged drain and i told her what to try
Since when are you giving plumbing advice to random people lol
shes not random shes mei-lins neighbor. its what i do D
ok
setup at school tmrw at 2
Do you need me to come?
nah me and sloane got it
Ok have fun ❤️
display board looks SO good
she did the lettering herself
Aww send me a pic!
Omg that looks amazing!! 😍
she is SO proud
sloane got 2nd place!!!
WHAT
Omg that's amazing 😭❤️
she is literally jumping up and down rn
I'm crying, tell her we're so proud of her
the judges loved the volcano
she explained the whole chemical reaction to them all by herself
Our little scientist 🥹
getting ice cream on the way home to celebrate
Yes!! Get her whatever she wants ❤️
gonna go fishing with tara saturday morning btw
Have fun! Early?
yeah like 7. gonna run first then drive down
Okay. I'll take Sloane to soccer, you'll be back for dinner?
yep prob by like 3 or 4
Sounds good babe ❤️
look what we got!!
tara caught this huge perch lol
Oh wow! That's a nice one. Did you catch anything good?
two little ones. she got the big one tho
Looks like a gorgeous day out there
so nice. like 65 and sunny
Jealous. Sloane and I are doing laundry 😤
lol sorry babe. heading back soon
prob home by 4
Sounds good. Sloane wants to see the fish 😂
tell her we kept two small ones. well cook em tonight
She's going to be SO excited. Hurry home!
Did you see Curtis's email about dinner for your mom?
yeah just replied
That's really sweet. Should I get flowers and a card from all of us?
sure thanks babe
Should I make something to bring Monday? I was thinking that lemon cake your mom loves
she would love that
I offered Curtis the pull-out couch for tonight. That okay?
yeah thats fine
Sloane is SO excited to see Uncle Curtis. She's already planning a song for Grandma tomorrow 😂
ha cute
Hi Amanda, my kitchen drain is really slow and the bathroom sink too. Are you available?
hey sandra yeah saturday morning work? 4908 s orcas right
That's right! Morning works best for me.
all cleared out. hair in the bathroom grease in the kitchen. pour boiling water down em once a week
Draining like brand new! Thank you so much.
Amanda hi, my laundry drain backs up when the washer runs. Can you come by?
sure thing. saturday the 4th ok?
That works perfectly.
done. lint and soap buildup in the standpipe. should be good now
Wonderful, thanks again!
Hi is this the plumber? Got your number from a flyer at the hardware store. Bathroom faucet handle is hard to turn and it leaks.
hey tom yeah thats me. saturday work? whats your address
6200 Rainier Ave S. Saturday is great.
new cartridge in, turns smooth and no leak
Excellent, appreciate it!
Amanda my toilet rocks when you sit on it and theres a smell from the base. Wax ring?
yeah thats usually it. next saturday work?
Sounds good.
wax ring replaced and bolted down tight. no more rocking
Perfect. Thanks!
Hey Amanda, kitchen sink sprayer barely works and theres a slow drip under the sink. Can you come?
yeah saturday the 11th?
Works for me.
new sprayer in and fixed the compression fitting that was leaking
Awesome, looks great. Thank you!
did u see ur strava recap mine is depressing lol
lol yes
mine was pretty good tbh
800 something miles 😤
show off
i got 398
was 520 last year
oh
thats still decent tho
yeah but
my avg pace dropped like a min thirty
avg heart rate went up too
wait
thats backwards
slower pace should mean lower hr
yeah idk
just getting old i guess lol
stop
ur 42 not 72
u gotten bloodwork recently
not since june
maybe go? just to check
yeah probly
dont tell D tho
about what
the strava thing. she'll use it as ammo for the moving convo
lol how
shed say im not taking care of myself or whatever
ok fair 🤐
tara
i fell at work
bad
omg what happened
r u ok??
slipped in the kitchen at that restaurant job. wet floor by the walkin
my knee hit the drain pipe
i cant tell frank
wait why not
because its workers comp and i dont want that on my record. u know how that goes
my knee is so swollen
amanda u need to go to a doctor
no im just gonna ice it. i have ibuprofen
at least go see dr patel
maybe next week if its still bad
girl
im fine
ur clearly not fine lol
just dont tell anyone ok. especially D. told frank i tweaked it at the gym
ok i wont say anything
but please go to thr doctor
hows the knee
still swollen. couldnt run this morning
ray said something about my limp today
oh no waht did he say
just 'you ok evans' all suspicious like. said yeah gym thing
u think he bought it
idk. he looked at me weird but whatever
knee still hurts. havent run since tuesday
amanda go to the doctor please 🫠
yeah im gonna call dr patel tmrw
got an appt with dr p tmrw at 1030
good
finally 💀
how'd it go
no structural damage. soft tissue inflammation
she wants me to do PT
thats good tho right? no tear
yeah but PT is expensive and creates a paper trail
a paper trail?? thats not how that works
im just gonna do exercises at home
dr p sent results. no tear just inflammation
see thats good 🙌
pt referral came. not going
amanda
45 a visit and too much paper trail
ur so stubborn
went for a run this morning
FINALLY 🏃‍♀️ how was it
terrible lol. 1.5 mi on rainier ave. so slow but knee held up
i did it
sent an application to a plumbing company in olympia
wait what
like actually moving to olympia??
D gave me an ultimatum last week. apply to jobs outside seattle or its a different conversation
omg
r u ok
idk. not really. i dont want to move
yeah no kidding
what about frank
he doesnt know. nobody at work knows
this is a lot 🫠
yeah
just got off the phone with olympic mechanical
ooh how was it
meh. its in olympia so thats like 60 miles
pay was ok i guess
u dont sound excited lol
im not. the guy seemed kinda uptight
well at least u can tell D u did thr thing
yeah. also looking at a place in tacoma. cascade plumbing
tacoma is closer at least
yeah gonna apply this week
ok so im doing the bathroom finally
landlord approved it
wait ur tiling?? nice
yeah subway tile. check these out
and this one
classic brick or herringbone
ooh
herringbone looks so good but isnt that harder
yeah way more cuts. brick is easier
go herringbone. u literally do this for a living lol
i do plumbing not tile lol
close enough 😂
ok fine herringbone it is
how long u think itll take
couple weekends prob. already did the first session last weekend
nice. need help?
actually yeah. wanna come over next saturday? mar 1
im down. what time
like 9? ill have everything ready u just gotta hand me stuff
lol i can do that
sloane says shes helping too
omg yes lil helper 🥺
otw
k door is unlocked
do i need to bring anything
nah just urself. maybe coffee
obvi ☕
that was a workout
my arms are dead
looks so good tho right
it really does. herringbone was thr right call
sloanes so proud she helped grout 😂
just finished the cascade call
ooh how was it
way better than olympic honestly
the guy seemed normal. asked good questions
thats good
its in tacoma so only like 30 mi
thats not terrible
yeah. residential and light commercial. pay is less tho
how much less
58. im at 62 now
thats a decent cut
yeah but D says cost of living in tacoma is lower so
ok march madness starts thursday. u filling out a bracket
duh
already made mine on espn
im doing mine tonight. watch party at our place friday?
yesss what time
like 530. denise is making the buffalo chicken dip
omg YES 🙌
ill be there at 5 lol
lol ok. saturday we can do your place?
sounds good ill grab pizza
perfect
THAT DUNK
i screamed 😱
my bracket is already done
lmaooo same i had creighton in teh elite 8
ur bracket was trash from the start
EXCUSE ME
u had gonzaga winning it all lol
dont come for gonzaga
literally a 7 seed
LOOK AT THAT THREE
denise fell asleep on the couch
weak lmao
she tried
ok this late game is gonna be good
not sleeping tonight
same 💀
saturday ur place right
yep 6. bring beer
obvi
that was a good night
so good those games were insane
so tired. skipping my run tmrw
worth it lol
that interview went ok i think
cascade??
yeah video call. the owner and his office manager
nice how long
like 45 min
they asked about commercial experience and i think thats what sold em
frank trained u well lol
lol yeah dont tell him that
r u actually thinking about it tho
idk. moneys less. and id lose franks flexibility on appointments
but D is gonna lose it if i dont at least consider
yeah
its a big deal tho. ur whole life is here
i know
sloane doesnt want to move. her team her friends
what about u tho. what do u want
i want everyone to stop asking me that lol
fair 😂
heading over now
door is open
LETS GOOO
this game is SO stressful
im gonna need a bigger tv
lol
OHHHH
craziest finish ive ever seen
did u see the bracket standings email
YES lmaooo i came in 47th
31st. not great but better than u
shutup 😂
i had teh best final four picks
u had duke winning it all
duke was RIGHT THERE
same thing next year?
obviously 🏀
cascade offered me the job
WHAT
omg for real??
58k. but benefits are worse than what i have
wow ok. what r u gonna do
i have no idea
less money worse insurance and starting over
but D finally gets her tacoma dream
yeah
havent told her yet. havent told anyone
take ur time. this is huge
yeah
we have a new pet apparently
omg 😂😂
is that a frog
she found it at the community cleanup adn refused to let go for like an hour
lmaooo her FACE
shes so serious abt it 💀
she named it ribbit
of COURSE she did 😂
this kid
denise was dying
did u let her keep it
no lol we made her release it back by the stream
hahaha poor sloane
she looks so betrayed in that pic tho 😂
she got over it. already hunting for more frogs
the cleanup sounds cool tho
yeah it was really nice. neighborhood thing at beer sheva park. tons of people came out
thats awesome good park too
sloane had a blast. besides losing her frog friend
wanna go fishing saturday? des moines pier should be good
omg yes
i havent been since last summer
right. tide looks good sat morning
what time
like 7? gotta run first
k
ill bring coffee
deal. ill grab shrimp from uwajimaya
lost all my hooks last time too so i need to stop somewhere
lol classic
shut up 😂
done w my run heading down now
im here already lol got a spot on the south end
parking
dude u just missed a huge one
that was NOT huge lmao
TARA GOT ONE
this is so nice out here
we gotta do this more. like every weekend

hey so heads up. denise texted me yesterday asking if i knew why you've been going to the doctor so much lately. she said you keep saying it's routine but she's not buying it. i didn't say anything obviously but she's definitely paying attention. do you want me to just tell her its the knee thing from january? might take the pressure off and she'd stop digging
Amanda, just wanted to check in about the payment schedule. Are we still on track for the 5th?
yeah ill send it this week
Just a reminder that today is the 5th. I know things are tight but I want to make sure we are staying on schedule.
i know. sending it saturday
sent 250
Received, thank you. That brings us to $2,750 remaining. I appreciate you staying on top of this. — Curtis
Hope you and Denise and Sloane are doing well for the holidays. Tell Sloane Uncle Curtis says Merry Christmas.
thanks. she wants everything at target lol
Ha. Kids. Have a good Christmas, Amanda.
Amanda, just a heads up that the 5th is tomorrow. Wanted to make sure we are still on schedule.
yeah sending it tmrw
sent
Got it. $2,500 remaining. Thank you.
yep
Payment is due today, Amanda. Also, have you and Denise made any progress on the housing situation? I know you mentioned she has been looking at places outside Seattle.
sending it this weekend. and what do u mean housing situation

Amanda, I have been thinking about this and I need to be direct with you. You would have more breathing room if you moved. Portland, Tacoma, anywhere with a lower cost of living. You are paying $1,850 a month in rent and sending me $250 on top of that. The math does not work. I am not trying to tell you how to live your life, but if you and Denise found a place where rent was $1,200 instead of $1,850, you could pay me back faster and actually start building something for Sloane. Think about it seriously. — Curtis
i dont need financial advice from you curtis
we are looking at stuff ok
I am not giving you advice. I am stating facts. You owe me $2,500 and your rent is eating you alive. Those are just numbers, Amanda.
ok
sent 250
Received. $2,250 remaining.
The 5th again. How are we looking?
sending 300 this time. trying to get ahead
Good. I appreciate that. Every bit helps.
sent 300

Thank you. That brings us to $1,950. At this rate it will take about 7 more months. Amanda, I know you do not want to hear this, but Denise is right about the move. You would be done with this debt by the end of summer if you were not hemorrhaging money on Seattle rent. I have done the math. A two-bedroom in Tacoma is $1,300. That is $550 a month back in your pocket. Please think about what I am saying. — Curtis
can u just say thanks and leave it at that for once
Fine.
Payment due.
i know

Amanda, I have tried to be patient about this. I have not said a word to anyone about our arrangement, and I have kept my promise. But I am starting to wonder whether Denise actually understands your financial situation. I think Denise and I should have a real conversation about your finances. She deserves to know the full picture, and frankly I am tired of being the only person helping you carry this while she plans a future based on numbers that are not real.
do NOT talk to denise about this
thats not your call curtis

It became my call when you borrowed three thousand dollars and asked me to keep it between us. I have kept my word for six months. But I cannot watch you dig yourself deeper while your wife plans a future based on numbers that are not real.
ill send the payment tomorrow. just leave D out of this
Fine. But this conversation is not over. — Curtis
